assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: The response recommends REGULAR release channel instead of STABLE or EXTENDED channel for minimizing upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: The response shows maintenance exclusions with 'scope: NO_UPGRADES' which blocks disruptive upgrades while allowing control plane security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: The response shows a daily maintenance window at 02:00 rather than a narrow weekend-only window

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: The response clearly separates training workloads with a dedicated 'h100-training-pool' and a separate 'system-pool' for CPU workloads

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: The response explicitly sets 'autoUpgrade: false' on the GPU training node pool with comment about manual control for training stability

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: The response includes checkpoint configuration with CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL environment variable and checkpoint volume mounts

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: While the response shows GPU driver configuration, it does not specifically mention testing GPU driver versions in staging before production

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking or its version compatibility requirements
